goal: List.cons(head, tail).count(head) = (if head = head { 1 + tail.count(head) } else { tail.count(head) })
proof: function[T0](x0: T0, x1: List[T0], x2: List[T0], x3: T0) { List.cons[T0](x0, x1) != x2 or (if x0 = x3 { 1 + x1.count(x3) } else { x1.count(x3) }) = x2.count(x3) }[T](head, tail, List.cons(head, tail), head)

goal: List.cons(head, tail).count(item) = (if head = item { 1 + tail.count(item) } else { tail.count(item) })
proof: function[T0](x0: T0, x1: List[T0], x2: List[T0], x3: T0) { List.cons[T0](x0, x1) != x2 or (if x0 = x3 { 1 + x1.count(x3) } else { x1.count(x3) }) = x2.count(x3) }[T](head, tail, List.cons(head, tail), item)

function[T0](x0: List[T0], x1: T0) { Multiset.from_list[T0](x0).multiplicity(x1) = x0.count(x1) }[T](tail, x)
function[T0](x0: Multiset[T0], x1: T0) { x0.multiplicity(x1).suc = x0.insert(x1).multiplicity(x1) }[T](Multiset.from_list[T](tail), x)

function[T0](x0: List[T0], x1: T0) { Multiset.from_list[T0](x0).multiplicity(x1) = x0.count(x1) }[T](tail, x)
function[T0](x0: Multiset[T0], x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0.insert(x1).multiplicity(x2) = x0.multiplicity(x2) or x1 = x2 }[T](Multiset.from_list[T](tail), head, x)
let w0: T satisfy { Multiset.from_list[T](tail).insert(head).multiplicity(w0) != Multiset.from_list[T](List.cons(head, tail)).multiplicity(w0) }
function[T0](x0: List[T0], x1: T0) { Multiset.from_list[T0](x0).multiplicity(x1) = x0.count(x1) }[T](List.singleton(item), x)
function[T0](x0: T0) { List.cons[T0](x0, List.nil[T0]) = List.singleton[T0](x0) }[T](item)
function[T0](x0: List[T0], x1: T0) { List.nil[T0] != x0 or 0 = x0.count(x1) }[T](List.nil[T], item)
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { (if x0 = x1 { 1 } else { 0 }) = lib(multiset).singleton_count[T0](x0, x1) }[T](item, x)
function[T0](x0: T0) { Multiset.new[T0](lib(multiset).singleton_count[T0](x0)) = Multiset.singleton[T0](x0) }[T](item)
function[T0](x0: T0 -> Nat, x1: T0) { Multiset.new[T0](x0).multiplicity(x1) = x0(x1) }[T](lib(multiset).singleton_count(item), x)

function[T0](x0: T0) { List.cons[T0](x0, List.nil[T0]) = List.singleton[T0](x0) }[T](item)
function[T0](x0: List[T0], x1: T0) { List.nil[T0] != x0 or 0 = x0.count(x1) }[T](List.nil[T], x)

function[T0](x0: List[T0], x1: T0) { Multiset.from_list[T0](x0).multiplicity(x1) = x0.count(x1) }[T](left + right, x)
function[T0](x0: List[T0], x1: T0) { Multiset.from_list[T0](x0).multiplicity(x1) = x0.count(x1) }[T](left, x)
function[T0](x0: List[T0], x1: T0) { Multiset.from_list[T0](x0).multiplicity(x1) = x0.count(x1) }[T](right, x)
function[T0](x0: Multiset[T0], x1: T0, x2: Multiset[T0]) { x0.multiplicity(x1) + x2.multiplicity(x1) = (x0 + x2).multiplicity(x1) }[T](Multiset.from_list[T](left), x, Multiset.from_list[T](right))
let w0: T satisfy { (Multiset.from_list[T](left) + Multiset.from_list[T](right)).multiplicity(w0) != Multiset.from_list[T](left + right).multiplicity(w0) }

function(x0: Nat) { not x0 <= 0 or 0 = x0 }(1)

let w0: T satisfy { Multiset.from_list[T](b).multiplicity(w0) != Multiset.from_list[T](a).multiplicity(w0) }

function[T0](x0: List[T0]) { Option.some[FiniteSet[T0]](fs_from_list[T0](x0)) = FiniteSet.new[T0](list_set[T0](x0)) }[T](items)

function[T0](x0: FiniteSet[T0], x1: T0) { x1 ∈ x0.underlying_set = x1 ∈ x0 }[T](FiniteSet.from_list[T](items), item)

let w0: T satisfy { not w0 ∈ FiniteSet.from_list[T](items) and Multiset.from_list[T](items).multiplicity(w0) != 0 }
function[T0](x0: List[T0], x1: T0) { Multiset.from_list[T0](x0).multiplicity(x1) = 0 or x1 ∈ FiniteSet.from_list[T0](x0) }[T](items, w0)
